title: Understanding the Virtual DOM in React and Vue

questions.sentence: One of the key concepts behind the high performance of React and Vue is the 'Virtual DOM'.
Updating the actual DOM of a web browser is a slow and expensive process.
To optimize this, these frameworks maintain a 'Virtual DOM', which is a lightweight copy of the real DOM in JavaScript memory.
When a component's state changes, the framework updates the Virtual DOM first.
Finally, it 'Patches' the real DOM by updating only the elements that have changed.
This approach prevents unnecessary re-renders of the entire page, resulting in a much faster and smoother user experience.
